ground_truth: A large rabbit sits in a meadow and looks around curiously, then begins to sniff the ground. The rabbit hops a short distance before pausing to observe its surroundings. Butterflies flutter nearby as the scene pans across a lush green landscape.

A silver SUV navigates a winding dirt road through a forested area, kicking up dust as it accelerates. The vehicle handles the uneven terrain with ease, weaving between trees and rocks. The camera follows from behind as the SUV crests a hill and continues down the trail.
